base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of small_mario — a character (playable) from 1988 super mario bros 3. Small Mario — stand/walk/run/jump/swim/duck/hurt/dead. Default form after hit. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Small Mario — stand/walk/run/jump/swim/duck/hurt/dead. Default form after hit
